pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for this script path directly.
export_result.sh checks for this markdown file directly.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a combination of real USGS Noto Peninsula earthquake data and 5 synthetically generated aftershocks injected into the SeisComP database during setup. The evaluation scripts explicitly look for the Python script at /home/ga/Documents/generate_report.py and the markdown report at /home/ga/Documents/seismicity_report.md.
